summary: Iteration 45 testing complete. Square checkout P0 fix verified - webhook handlers, verify-payment self-recovery, admin/activate, admin/bulk-verify all working. Fixed critical bug in Square SDK SyncPager iteration (was using .payments/.result instead of direct iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Square SDK SyncPager iteration bug - was using .payments/.result attributes which don't exist. Correct way is to iterate directly over client.payments.list() response
VERIFIED: POST /api/square/webhook handles payment.completed, order.updated, order.completed, invoice.payment_made events
VERIFIED: POST /api/square/verify-payment returns 404 with helpful message for unknown emails
VERIFIED: POST /api/square/verify-payment returns 400/404 (not 500) when password is missing
VERIFIED: POST /api/square/admin/activate returns 403 for non-admin, creates subscription for admin
VERIFIED: POST /api/square/admin/bulk-verify returns correct structure with activated count and Square payment count
VERIFIED: GET /api/square/status/{email} returns active:false for unknown email
VERIFIED: Existing auth flows (verify-whop, login) still work for manual_access_grants users
VERIFIED: Frontend 'Already paid? Verify your payment' link visible on login page
VERIFIED: Verify Payment page has email AND password fields
VERIFIED: Back button on Verify Payment returns to login
VERIFIED: Submitting verify payment with fake email shows proper error message
seed_data_creation: Test subscriptions created during admin/activate tests were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the Square checkout P0 fix. Key fix: Square SDK SyncPager iteration was broken - code was using .payments/.result attributes which don't exist in newer SDK versions. Correct way is to iterate directly over client.payments.list() response. All webhook event types tested (payment.completed, order.updated, order.completed, invoice.payment_made, subscription.updated). Admin bulk-verify now correctly finds 16 real production payments in Square. Frontend verify-payment flow works correctly with email+password fields.

bug_fixed.root_cause: Code was using payments_resp.payments or payments_resp.result to access payments, but Square SDK returns SyncPager which requires direct iteration
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed from 'for pmt in payments_resp.payments:' to 'for pmt in client.payments.list(...):' - iterate directly over the response
